sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_classes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, class_definition BLOB);

SELECT NOT BETWEEN property AND 10 FROM (SELECT java_load_class('java_server', file_to_string('java_server.class')), property FROM test_classes WHERE id = 1) AS loaded_class WHERE loaded_class.property IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_data (value INT, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (5, 'Test A'), (15, 'Test B'), (25, 'Test C');
SELECT description FROM test_data WHERE value NOT BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(value) FROM test_data) AND 20;

WITH loaded_class AS (SELECT java_load_class('java_server', file_to_string('java_server.class')) AS class_name) SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE value NOT BETWEEN (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_data) AND (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_data);
CREATE TABLE edge_cases (num_value DECIMAL(10, 2), str_value VARCHAR(50) NULL);
INSERT INTO edge_cases VALUES (NULL, NULL), (1.00, 'One'), (1000000.99, 'Million'), (0.00, 'Zero'), (NULL, 'Null String');

SELECT str_value FROM edge_cases WHERE num_value NOT BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(num_value) FROM edge_cases WHERE num_value IS NOT NULL) AND (SELECT MAX(num_value) FROM edge_cases WHERE num_value IS NOT NULL) OR str_value IS NULL;

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT java_load_class('java_server', file_to_string('java_server.class')) AS class_name, value FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS derived_table WHERE value NOT BETWEEN 10 AND 20 HAVING COUNT(value) > 0;
